docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-19-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMSEY, FRANCINE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY GUERRA, REBECCA RAMSEY, FRANCINE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. RULING FROM THE BENCH. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUERRA, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMSEY, FRANCINE $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $710.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY GUERRA, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT RAMSEY, FRANCINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
